10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 12:32:59 2012

14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Fonction interne wrappant un algorithme utilisateur
17  *
18  */
19 
20 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/IFunction.h"
21 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/EvalFunctionTraits.h"
22 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/StateEvaluator.h"
23 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/VariableEvaluator.h"
24 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/VariableManager.h"
25 
26 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
27 
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 
31 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
32 
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
35 
36 /*
37  * \ingroup Law
38  * \brief Fonction interne wrappant un algorithme utilisateur
39  *
40  */
41 template<typename T>
42 class FunctionT : public IFunction
43 {
44 private:
45 
46  static_assert(EvalFunctionTraits<T>::is_valid, "Law is not valid - are eval methods const?");
47 
48  typedef typename T::Signature Signature;
49 
50 public:
51 
52  FunctionT(Integer id, const T& algo, const Signature& signature, bool is_parameter)
53  : m_id(id)
54  , m_is_parameter(is_parameter)
55  , m_algo(algo)
56  , m_signature(signature)
57  , m_state_evaluator(m_algo,m_signature)
58  , m_deriv_state_evaluator(m_algo,m_signature)
59  , m_evaluator(m_algo,m_signature)
60  , m_deriv_evaluator(m_algo,m_signature)
61  {
62  if(id < 0) throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Function construction error : id < 0");
63  }
64 
65  Integer id() const { return m_id; }
66 
67  bool isParameter() const { return m_is_parameter; }
68 
70  bool isDifferentiable() const { return EvalFunctionTraits<T>::is_differentiable; }
71 
73  void evaluate(const State& s, State& r) const
74  {
75  m_state_evaluator(s,r);
76  }
77  void eval(const State& s, State& r) const
78  {
79  m_state_evaluator(s,r);
80  }
81 
83  void evaluate(const State& s, State& r, Derivative& d) const
84  {
85  m_deriv_state_evaluator(s,r,d);
86  }
87  void eval(const State& s, State& r, Derivative& d) const
88  {
89  m_deriv_state_evaluator(s,r,d);
90  }
91 
92 
94  void evaluate(const VariableAccessor& v,
95  const Arcane::ItemGroup& group,
96  EvaluationMode mode,
97  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns) const
98  {
99  GroupEnumerator g(group);
100  switch(mode) {
101  case eWithoutDerivative:
102  m_evaluator(v,g);
103  break;
104  case eWithDerivative:
105  m_deriv_evaluator(v,g,max_nb_unknowns);
106  break;
107  default:
108  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
109  }
110  }
111 
113  void evaluate(const PartialVariableAccessor& v,
114  const Arcane::ItemGroup& group,
115  EvaluationMode mode,
116  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns) const
117  {
118  GroupEnumerator g(group);
119  switch(mode) {
120  case eWithoutDerivative:
121  m_evaluator(v,g);
122  break;
123  case eWithDerivative:
124  m_deriv_evaluator(v,g,max_nb_unknowns);
125  break;
126  default:
127  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
128  }
129  }
130 
132  void evaluate(const ArrayAccessor& v,
133  const Arcane::Integer& begin,
134  const Arcane::Integer& end,
135  EvaluationMode mode,
136  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns) const
137  {
138  RangeEnumerator g(begin, end);
139  switch(mode) {
140  case eWithoutDerivative:
141  m_evaluator(v,g);
142  break;
143  case eWithDerivative:
144  m_deriv_evaluator(v,g,max_nb_unknowns);
145  break;
146  default:
147  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
148  }
149  }
150 
152  void evaluate(const ScalarAccessor& v,
153  EvaluationMode mode,
154  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns) const
155  {
156  switch(mode) {
157  case eWithoutDerivative:
158  m_evaluator(v);
159  break;
160  case eWithDerivative:
161  m_deriv_evaluator(v,max_nb_unknowns);
162  break;
163  default:
164  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
165  }
166  }
167 
169  PropertyVector in() const { return m_signature.inProperties(); }
170 
172  PropertyVector out() const { return m_signature.outProperties(); }
173 
175  PropertyVector parameters() const { return m_signature.parameters(); }
176 
177 private:
178 
180  Integer m_id;
181 
183  bool m_is_parameter;
184 
186  const T& m_algo;
187 
189  const Signature m_signature;
190 
192  const StateEvaluator<T> m_state_evaluator;
193  // NB: envoie un FataErrorException � l'�valuation si la fonction n'est pas d�rivable
194  const DerivativeStateEvaluator<T,EvalFunctionTraits<T>::is_differentiable> m_deriv_state_evaluator;
195 
197  const Evaluator<T> m_evaluator;
198  // NB: envoie un FataErrorException � l'�valuation si la fonction n'est pas d�rivable
199  const DerivativeEvaluator<T,EvalFunctionTraits<T>::is_differentiable> m_deriv_evaluator;
200 };
201 
202 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
203 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
204 
205 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
206
